agent_reviews.advisory_recommendation: Keep Mustard X, options-gap agreement, and AI hypotheses in research/shadow until closed realized R by clean cohort proves incremental expectancy.
key_findings: Daily certification is FAIL/REJECTED and promotion gate blocks all 25 strategies.
Mustard forward is not money-proven: 40 candidates, 33 entered, 6 graded, 6 target hits, 0 stops, total_realized_r -0.539, avg_realized_r -0.0898.
Visible Mustard detail shows 10 of 12 rows entered; most entered rows are track_only and several are NO_PARENT_EDGE or GAPS_MISSING.
Several target distances are too small versus stop risk to prove edge after slippage: IREN about 0.022R, IOVA about 0.050R, KEEL about 0.0695R, TXG about 0.0872R.
VIVK is a money-quality red flag: target-hit style status but realized_r -0.5205 after large slippage.
Panel score is positive at actual_realized_pnl 102.6578 across 28 actual trades and 8 closed, but certification rejection prevents promotion use.
agent_reviews.label: Quant Edge Agent

agent_reviews.advisory_recommendation: Reconcile permission truth, fill truth, exit truth, and authoritative realized P/L before trusting forward evidence or next-session edge reads.
key_findings: Broker reconcile is clean and flat now: broker_connected true, positions 0, open_orders 0, unprotected_positions 0.
Live gate conformance is FAIL: blocked_route_orders 6, orders_checked 6, fills_checked 2, allowed_routes 0.
Permission enforcement remains a risk signal: route_lock_enforce false, trade_permission_enforce false, legacy_trade_permission_enforce false, active_entry_enforcement false.
Bot gate audit is WARN while profit_lock_enabled is false and legacy_moo_active_in_daily_launcher is true.
Health is FAIL with stale RTH sources including fill/exit reconcile, live-fire accounting, route readiness, session context, ghost ledger, and accountability.
Giveback counterfactual has graded 0 and source age from 2026-07-01, so it cannot support tuning.
agent_reviews.label: Execution Risk Agent

agent_reviews.advisory_recommendation: Quarantine promotion and score interpretation until panel, pick, decision, order, fill, exit, realized result, and score provenance agree.
key_findings: Daily spine rejected the evidence because critical registry, score, and order contract breaches are present.
Panel score reports 28 actual trades, 8 closed, and actual_realized_pnl 102.6578, while live gate conformance reports execution_truth_closed 0 and execution_truth_realized_pnl 0.0.
Broker reconcile reports flat truth, but Mustard forward reports 27 open-after-entry and 7 pending rows; these states need ownership clarification.
Live gate conformance checked only 2 fills versus materially larger panel and Mustard entry counts.
All visible Mustard rows carry score 49.0 despite mixed, track-only, no-parent, and GAPS_MISSING classifications.
Promotion gate correctly blocks all 25 strategies with certification REJECTED, normal_partition_leaks 0, and forward_order_breaches 0.
agent_reviews.label: Contract Spine Agent

agent_reviews.advisory_recommendation: Keep gap/options agreement as a shadow tag and separate first-push scalp evidence from 2R/3R runner or clear-highway hypotheses.
key_findings: Gap/options coverage is thin: 1665 traces, 119 fully checked, 89 clear agreements, 13 gap-clear/options-block conflicts, 17 mixed or weak agreements, and 331 no maps.
Missing or stale context is material: 439 gaps_missing, 972 options_missing, and 456 options stale or not fresh.
Visible Mustard rows split roughly between AGREE and GAPS_MISSING; several GAPS_MISSING/no-parent rows still show entered states.
For options-checked Mustard rows, call walls before 2R and 3R support tiny first-target scalp context more than runner/highway conviction.
AGREE rows need a separate realized cohort because the visible target distance averaged around 0.06R, too small to infer scalable runner edge.
agent_reviews.label: Auction + Options Agent

llm_call.confidence: medium_high for execution and contract risk; medium for no-promotion guidance; low_to_medium for edge claims because Mustard evidence is thin, gap/options coverage is incomplete, and giveback/gate-effectiveness sources are stale
do_not_change_yet: Do not change bot configuration, route policy, trade permissions, panel scores, gates, registry phases, order execution, or live trading behavior from this review.
Do not promote Mustard Runner, Mustard Grind, Mustard Mixed Research, options-gap agreement, Gap Reject Short, Surge, Short Universe, Live Fire, or any AI hypothesis from this packet.
Do not loosen route locks, trade permission checks, stale-fire handling, daily PnL guard, max-position controls, source freshness enforcement, promotion gates, or no-parent-lineage handling.
Do not blend EXPERIMENT, ghost, research, stale, or ungraded evidence into normal score partitions.
Do not tune giveback, profit lock, or daily guard behavior from this packet because giveback evidence has 0 graded samples and the source is stale from 2026-07-01.
Do not infer runner edge from options/gap agreement while call walls appear before 2R/3R and realized cohorts are thin or ungraded.
money_risks: Permission leakage risk: blocked or research-only concepts may appear as entered while route_lock_enforce and trade_permission_enforce are false.
Accounting risk: panel score reports positive actual P/L while live gate truth reports 0 closed and 0 realized P/L.
State ownership risk: broker is flat, but Mustard forward reports many open-after-entry or pending research states.
Fill coverage risk: live gate conformance checked only 2 fills while panel and Mustard counts are much larger.
False edge risk: high target-hit rate can still lose money when target distance is tiny, slippage is large, or fill-to-target is negative.
Stale evidence risk: gate effectiveness and giveback counterfactual are from 2026-07-01 and should not drive live tuning.
Coverage risk: only 119 of 1665 gap/options traces are fully checked, with many missing gap maps, missing options, or stale options.
Certification risk: daily certification is REJECTED and promotion gate is FAIL, so treating the packet as executable would contradict the contract spine.
open_questions: Which exact 6 blocked-route orders were checked, and did any reach broker execution or fills?
Why are route_lock_enforce, trade_permission_enforce, legacy_trade_permission_enforce, and active_entry_enforcement false while structural gates exist?
Are Mustard ENTERED rows live orders, paper fills, research fills, or display-state artifacts?
Which ledger is authoritative for realized P/L today: broker reconcile, panel score, live gate truth, or Mustard forward?
Why can a target-hit or CLOSED_TARGET-style row realize negative R, as seen in VIVK?
Why are no-parent, GAPS_MISSING, track-only, mixed, and cleaner rows all visible with score 49.0?
Can options-gap agreement prove incremental realized or clean ghost R versus gap-only picks over at least 20 to 30 fresh forward samples?
Are call_wall_before_2r and call_wall_before_3r intended to block runner expectations or only label runner risk?
priority_actions: Advisory only: reconcile the 6 blocked-route orders by trace/order ID against panel pick, decision, route permission, broker order, fill, exit, and realized-result truth.
Advisory only: identify why track_only, NO_PARENT_EDGE, and GAPS_MISSING Mustard rows show entered states, and classify whether they are live, paper, or research fills.
Advisory only: establish the authoritative realized-P/L ledger for today because panel score, live gate truth, broker truth, and Mustard forward do not yet align.
Advisory only: refresh or mark stale the health, gate-effectiveness, giveback, daily-certification, and promotion-gate sources before using them for next-session judgment.
Advisory only: review tiny target-R and large slippage cases, especially VIVK-style target labels with negative realized R.
Advisory only: keep Mustard X, gap/options agreement, and AI hypotheses in admitted shadow testing until fresh closed cohorts prove expectancy after fees and slippage.
llm_call.synthesis: The 2026-07-23 packet is research/display only and does not support any live behavior, route policy, gate, score, permission, registry, or execution change. Broker reconcile is currently flat and clean, but the internal contract evidence is not clean enough for money decisions: daily certification is REJECTED, health is FAIL, live gate conformance is FAIL with 6 blocked-route orders, and route/trade permission enforcement flags remain false. Mustard X and gap/options agreement remain useful research context, but 33 of 40 Mustard candidates are entered with only 6 graded and total_realized_r -0.539, while visible rows show track-only, no-parent, GAPS_MISSING, tiny target-R, and one negative realized target-style result. The single most money-relevant focus is reconciling permission, fill, exit, and realized-P/L truth before trusting any edge read.
watch_next_session: End-of-day flatness: zero broker positions and no unintended open orders after the scalping session.
Whether route_lock_enforce, trade_permission_enforce, legacy_trade_permission_enforce, active_entry_enforcement, or profit_lock_enabled remain false.
Any order accepted on a nontradable, route-locked, blocked-route, stale-fire, no-parent-lineage, GAPS_MISSING, or CONFLICT setup.
Any fill without fresh broker-backed exit protection, fill reconciliation, exit reconciliation, and realized-result linkage.
Whether today's Mustard entered rows close into realized R and whether AGREE rows outperform GAPS_MISSING rows after fees and slippage.
Whether VIVK-style target-hit labels with negative realized R repeat.
Whether call_wall_before_2r or call_wall_before_3r names fail to expand compared with clean-highway names.

Whether contract dashboard, contract breaks, accountability, fill/exit reconcile, ghost ledger, route readiness, decision obligation, live-fire accounting, live readiness, and session context refresh during RTH.
